programmes.show_description: A Mother is found murdered in the trunk of her car.  Was this a robbery gone wrong or something more sinister?  A case that was tried three times, could the killer still be on the loose?
Death of a delivery driver.  A young mother heads out to deliver a pizza and ends up dead.  Now her ex-boyfriend is under suspicion.  But did he act alone, or did he have help from his wife?
A doctor's wife dies under mysterious circumstances. When clues lead back to her husband, he flees the country.  But when he finally faces a jury, will there be enough evidence for a conviction?
A high school senior is murdered in his own home and investigators follow a string of clues to an unbelievable suspect, the victim's twin brother.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
Aileen Wuornos sold her body to survive and created a deep-seeded rage for those who would pay for her services. That rage resulted in her being called the first female serial killer in US history.
Ex-con Scott Nelson kidnapped and murdered a middle-aged nanny. Despite confessing to the brutal murder, Nelson had plans for his trial... a trial that would be a shocking as the crime itself.
William Coday was a mild-mannered librarian who thought he had met the love of his life. But her life would come to a brutal end, just as former lover of Coday's had years before.
It was the talk of the town. Betty Broderick, a Soccer Mom socialite who led a perfect life. Successful husband, kids, fancy house until it all came crashing down in divorce, and murder.
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.

What motivates a rampage killer? Court TV sits down with psychologists, investigators, survivors, and goes behind bars with a convicted mass shooter to find out.
Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.

Murdaugh Family Murders. Victim to Verdict with Ted Rowlands takes you inside the high-stakes trials that have captivated the true crime world. Hosted by Court TV's Ted Rowlands.
